calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement With Trustee Of Purported Trust Allegedly Created By M. Durham, Without Notice To D. Durham Until Etc.
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for David Durham.

Ms. Calhoun addressed the issue of venue and presented oral argument to support her position with regard to there being no need for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for the Minors. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement With Trustee Of Purported Trust Allegedly Created By M. Durham, Without Notice To D. Durham Until Etc.
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Continued To May-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
